images.prompt: Which image best represents Hagar finding water in the wilderness?

reasons.hagar-wilderness-well.png: Shows Hagar and the boy by a newly seen water source, which matches Genesis 21 most directly.
reasons.well-in-beersheba.png: Represents the well itself but leaves out Hagar finding it.
reasons.desert-road-family.png: Suggests wilderness travel, but not the moment of seeing the water source.
reasons.isaac-birth-joy.png: Represents a different Genesis 21 scene centered on Isaac's birth.

images.prompt: Which image best represents Abraham and Abimelech making an agreement?

reasons.abraham-abimelech-agreement.png: Shows two men making a peaceful agreement, matching Genesis 21 directly.
reasons.fleeing-sodom.png: Represents Lot's family escaping, which belongs to Genesis 19 instead.
reasons.zoar-distant-town.png: Represents the town Lot fled to, not the Beersheba agreement scene.
reasons.smoke-rising-plain.png: Represents Abraham seeing smoke rise from the land after Sodom's destruction, not the treaty scene.
